id: find the server that you have access to
intention: 查找你有权限访问的服务器
naturalChunk: find the server that you have access to
avoidSaying: look up the server which you can visit
sentencePatterns: You can find the ... server that you have access to.
First, find the server that you have access to.
realLifeExamples: You can find the Panzura server that you have access to.
First, find the server that you have access to and then check the logs.
usageNotes: 查找某台可访问的服务器时，find ... that you have access to 比 look up ... which you can visit 更自然。
productionPrompts: 用 find the server that you have access to 造一句和系统操作有关的句子。
